MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO Defendant in pro per Stephanie McCloud, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Progam Policies and Procedures Number Four, Administrative fee, is off CALENDAR/Compliance. Proceedings reported by: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542. (212)

Ntc And Mtn To Compel ; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Tyler Macmillan, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Maria Cherundolo

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Maria Cherundolo's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $415 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
